final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use in SGA
Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Selling Expenses Other' and 'Administration Expenses Other', which are component rows below the SG&A totals. The separately disclosed SG&A depreciation rows sit alongside those selected rows and are not embedded in them. 'Depreciation in SGA' appears twice in the statement and captures both selling and administration depreciation; the exact label is therefore included once as written.
